name: Virtual Machine High Privilege Role Unassigned
notes:
This rule removes the Machine ID (of the virtual machine) from the reference set "Resources with High Privilege Roles" if it was unassigned a high privilege role.

Note: The Low Privilege Role Names reference set must be populated with the relevant role names. Anything not defined in this Reference Set is considered as suspicious in terms of privileges.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Role Unassignment Success
when any of Machine Identifier (custom) are contained in any of Resources with High Privilege Roles - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when any of Role Name (custom) are contained in any of Low Privilege Role Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Virtual Machine High Privilege Role Unassigned on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Role Unassignment Success
AND when any of Machine Identifier (custom) are contained in any of Resources with High Privilege Roles - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND NOT when any of Role Name (custom) are contained in any of Low Privilege Role Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Remove "Machine Identifier" from Reference Set: "Resources with High Privilege Roles"
